title: In Aid of The Moving Menagerie Creature Show
summary: Four creatures from the Moving Menagerie have escaped into the city - an Owlbear rampaging through the market district, a Blue Dragon Wyrmling loose on the rooftops, and a pack of Shadow Mastiffs in the darker streets. The Menagerie departs soon.
expires: Contract lapses when the Menagerie leaves Dorel
